Text.Main: May your Path and your Way always be as one.
The Shaman's Gate shall remain open to you.  Good luck!
I have opened the Aveger's Gate.  You may now pass.
Interrupted!  You must remain still while using items in the world.

[$emote]The valve's wheel groans and creaks as you turn it.  It has obviously not been turned in years.  After much effort you manage to open the valve, but nothing seems to happen.  This valve has done nothing to relieve the pressure on the dam.  You think to yourself that the idea of opening valves to relieve the pressure on the dam is a good one, but this valve did not help.[$/emote]

[$imp]Find another way to relieve the pressure on the dam.[$/imp]
You hear and feel a rumbling across the entire dam as you open this valve.
Duel Master:  Let us begin, eh?!  Attack!
Left click on Archon Davon, the NPC standing in the pillar of light, to continue.
By the Blood!  Move!  Warn them about these Human Raiders, now!
Approaching exit to the Proving Grounds
Keep at it, you've got the heart of a warrior!

The Tierra Roja Dam is a tutorial area you can use to gain a better understanding of the controls and play style in [$npc]Auto Assault[$/npc].  However, the Tierra Roja Dam is also an [$imp]instanced map[$/imp] - a private map that only you have access to.  Since the Dam is an instance map, your progress within the map was lost when you left before the missions here were completed.  [$inst](Instanced maps are meant to be completed in a single sitting and reset to their original state when every member of your convoy leaves them.)[$/inst]  

You will need to play through this map from the beginning to the end if you wish to complete this new user experience.

If you would like, you can bypass the new user experience and go directly to [$loc]The Proving Ground[$/loc], a desert wasteland that serves as the starting area for new Mutant players. Would you like to [$imp]continue[$/imp] the tutorial or [$imp]bypass[$/imp] it and go to the Proving Ground instead?
